lobby.share_code: Share this code with your friends to let them join!
lobby.need_min: Need at least {{count}} players to start

objective.title: Objective
objective.description: Find out who the impostor is… or fool everyone if it's you.

setup.title: Setup
setup.item1: Each player receives a secret word.
setup.item2: All players get the same word, except the impostor.
setup.item3: The impostor receives only a related hint, not the exact word.

drawing.title: Drawing Turns
drawing.item1: The game is played in turns.
drawing.item2: In each turn, each player draws a part of the word.
drawing.item3: The drawing is shared: everyone contributes to the same canvas.

observe.title: Observe & Deduce
observe.item1: While drawing, try to figure out who doesn't know the word.
observe.item2: The impostor must draw carefully to avoid suspicion.

voting.title: Voting Phase
voting.description: At the end of the round:
voting.item1: Players can vote to eliminate someone or skip the vote.
voting.item2: If a player gets the majority of votes, they are eliminated.

end.title: End of the Game
end.item1: If the impostor is caught → the players win.
end.item2: If the impostor survives → the impostor wins.

tip.title: Tip
tip.description: Draw enough to show you know the word… but don't make it too obvious

role.title: Your Secret Role
role.make_sure: Make sure everyone knows their role before continuing.

voting.title: Voting Time
voting.waiting_others: Waiting for other players to vote...
